cards.label: Update
cards.title: Devlog One
cards.description: First devlog. Behind the scenes of building the engine and tools.

cards.label: Progress
cards.title: Devlog Two
cards.description: Second entry. Challenges with the card game engine and how I overcame them.

cards.label: Design
cards.title: Devlog Three

cards.name: Home
cards.title: Yugimon Universe
cards.description: Welcome to Life Snake Studio. Explore the world of Yugimon: the lore, the trading card game, and licensing opportunities for indie developers.

cards.name: World
cards.title: Yugimon World
cards.description: Dive into the lore, explore regions via an interactive map, and browse the creature and character directories.

cards.name: TCG
cards.title: Trading Card Game
cards.description: Learn the rules, search the card database, build decks, and explore formats, sets, and strategy guides.

cards.name: Engine & Devkit
cards.title: Engine & Devkit
cards.description: The custom toolset I built to make games faster. Currently a Unity asset, later its own engine layer on Stride.

cards.name: Licensing
cards.title: Licensing
cards.description: License the Yugimon IP. Browse the asset catalog, compare pricing tiers, and apply to use official assets.

cards.name: Community
cards.title: Community
cards.description: Join the discussion on Discord and forums. See fan content, licensed game spotlights, and connect with creators.

cards.name: Contact
cards.title: Contact
cards.description: General questions, press inquiries, or direct links to the licensing application. We'd love to hear from you.

cards.name: Press Kit
cards.title: Press Kit
cards.description: Download official logos, key art, fact sheet, and media assets for press, creators, and partners.

cards.label: Intro
cards.title: Blog Page 1
cards.description: This is the first public blog page. It introduces the blog, the tone, and what kind of updates will appear here.

cards.label: Dev log
cards.title: Blog Page 2
cards.description: A dev log post about progress, tools, design decisions, or whatever else belongs in the personal feed.

cards.label: Notes
cards.title: Blog Page 3
cards.description: Another post card in the blog feed. Add as many as you want without mixing them into the main feed.

cards.label: Update
cards.title: Blog Page 4
cards.description: Extra post only visible on the full blog page. The main feed only shows the preview card.
